title: moraea neglecta
intro: Moraea neglecta, also known as the Scarlet Hilliker or Hilliker's Flag, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial bulbous geophyte that produces vibrant red or reddish-purple flowers. Moraea neglecta has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, teas, and extracts, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
